---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the deployment setup
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature or improvement you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you'd like to see (e.g. a new service in `docker-compose.yml`, a new env variable, a helper script, etc.).

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Links, references, or any other context that helps explain the request.
